bribe().details: Skips silently if balance is below MIN_BRIBE_AMOUNT or insufficient for the duration

constructor.details: Lock the implementation contract against initialization

returns._0: The next period start timestamp as uint32

params._campaignData: Encoded campaign data passed to the Merkl distributor
params._campaignType: Type identifier for the Merkl campaign
params._merklDistributor: Address of the Merkl distributor contract

params.token: Address of the token to rescue

MIN_BRIBE_AMOUNT().notice: Minimum bribe amount to execute a bribe

bribe().notice: Execute a bribe by creating a campaign on the Merkl distributor

campaignData().notice: Encoded campaign data passed to the Merkl distributor

campaignType().notice: Type identifier for the Merkl campaign

claimGovernance().notice: Claim Governance of the contract to a new account (`newGovernor`). Can only be called by the new Governor.

duration().notice: Duration of each campaign period in seconds

factory().notice: Address of the factory that created this pool booster

getNextPeriodStartTime().notice: Returns the timestamp for the start of the next period based on the configured duration

governor().notice: Returns the address of the current Governor.

initialize(uint32,uint32,address,address.notice: Initialize the contract with campaign parameters and governance

isGovernor().notice: Returns true if the caller is the current Governor.

merklDistributor().notice: Merkl distributor contract used to create campaigns

rescueToken(address,address).notice: Rescue ERC20 tokens from the contract

rewardToken().notice: Address of the reward token used for bribes

transferGovernance(address).notice: Transfers Governance of the contract to a new account (`newGovernor`). Can only be called by the current Governor. Must be claimed for this to complete

userdoc.notice: Pool booster that creates campaigns on the Merkl distributor to incentivize liquidity.
